allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); abi=d.get\('abi',[]\); [print\(json.dumps\(f\)\) for f in abi if f.get\('type'\)=='function']")

Bash(python -c "import json; d=json.load\(open\('CopyGuardBondVault.json'\)\); abi=d.get\('abi',[]\); funcs=[f for f in abi if f.get\('type'\)=='function']; [print\(f['name'],'\(',','.join\([i['type'] for i in f.get\('inputs',[]]\)],'\)'\) for f in funcs]")
